summary.text: Customers find these shoes to be of good quality and very comfortable, noting they do not hurt their feet. However, opinions on the fit vary among users.

authors_reviews.title: Very good
authors_reviews.text: very nice !! my daughter was super happy !!
authors_reviews.author: Brad Kennedy

authors_reviews.title: Low quality. Price not commensurate.
authors_reviews.text: Shoe quality was poor.Very cheap material/fabric.Very expensive for this kind of quality.Seriously would have given it a 1-star, but the black and white color looks good from a distance.Canadian customer.
authors_reviews.author: Chuck Ufondu
